Key points 
Prepare for winter storms by planning ahead, getting supplies, and getting your home and car ready. 
Listen to weather forecasts regularly. 
Be prepared for winter weather 
Prepare for winter storms by planning ahead, getting supplies, and getting your home and car ready. 
During extremely cold weather or winter storms, staying warm and safe can be a challenge. Winter storm
